chat.code: if(!input.message)return{reply:'Ask me anything!'};return {reply:'You said: '+String(input.message).slice(0,200)+'. (This demo echoes — wire me to a real AI in the dashboard.)'};

blocks.headline: An AI assistant that actually gets things done
blocks.sub: Askly answers questions, drafts replies, and digs through your docs — instantly, in plain language. Try the live demo below, then plug it into your own knowledge in minutes.

items.d: Ask in plain English and get a direct, sourced answer — Askly reads your content so your team doesn't have to dig through it.
Reply to customers, write summaries, and turn rough notes into polished copy that sounds like you, not a robot.
Point Askly at your docs, tickets, and databases. It stays in sync so every answer reflects the latest, not last quarter.

blocks.html:
Try Askly

This is a live demo running on a sandboxed server function. Say hello.

Hi! I'm Askly. Ask me anything to see how I respond.
blocks.css: .ak-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;padding:64px 20px}.ak-card{width:100%;max-width:560px;padding:32px;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(34,211,238,.18)}.ak-card h2{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.5rem}.ak-card>p{margin:0 0 20px;opacity:.75;font-size:.95rem}.ak-log{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;min-height:140px;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px 2px;margin:0 0 16px}.ak-msg{max-width:82%;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:14px;line-height:1.45;font-size:.95rem;word-wrap:break-word}.ak-bot{align-self:flex-start;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}.ak-user{align-self:flex-end;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c5cff,#22d3ee);color:#0b0b16;font-weight:600}.ak-form{display:flex;gap:10px}.ak-form input{flex:1 1 auto;min-width:0;padding:13px 16px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:inherit;font-size:1rem}.ak-form button{padding:13px 22px;border:0;border-radius:12px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c5cff,#22d3ee);color:#0b0b16}.ak-form button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}
blocks.js: (function(){var f=document.getElementById('ak-form');if(!f)return;var input=document.getElementById('ak-input');var btn=document.getElementById('ak-send');var log=document.getElementById('ak-log');function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"]/g,function(c){return{'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"'}[c];});}function add(text,who){var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='ak-msg '+(who==='user'?'ak-user':'ak-bot');d.innerHTML=esc(text);log.appendChild(d);log.scrollTop=log.scrollHeight;return d;}f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var msg=(input.value||'').trim();if(!msg)return;add(msg,'user');input.value='';btn.disabled=true;var thinking=add('…','bot');fetch('/api/fn/chat',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({message:msg})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad status');return r.json();}).then(function(d){var reply=(d&&d.result&&d.result.reply)?d.result.reply:(d&&d.reply)?d.reply:'(no reply)';thinking.textContent=reply;log.scrollTop=log.scrollHeight;btn.disabled=false;input.focus();}).catch(function(){thinking.textContent='Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.';btn.disabled=false;});});})();
